languages.text: "Вы знали, что на платформе были обнаружены признаки ксенотеха?"
"Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"
languages.original_text: "Вы знали, что на платформе были обнаружены признаки ксенотеха?"

traits.locale_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"
"Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"
"Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

languages.text: 「異種技術の痕跡がプラットフォームで発見されたことを、あなたは知っていたか？」
languages.original_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

traits.locale_text: 「異種技術の痕跡がプラットフォームで発見されたことを、あなたは知っていましたか？」

languages.text: «¿Era consciente de que se habían descubierto signos de xenotecnología en la plataforma?».
languages.original_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Era consciente de que se habían descubierto signos de xenotecnología en la plataforma?».

languages.text: “平台上发现了异形科技的痕迹，你知道吗？”
languages.original_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

traits.locale_text: “平台上发现了异形科技的痕迹，你知道吗？”

languages.text: "Wusstet Ihr, dass Anzeichen von Xenotech auf der Plattform entdeckt worden waren?"
languages.original_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

traits.locale_text: "Wusstet Ihr, dass Anzeichen von Xenotech auf der Plattform entdeckt worden waren?"

languages.text: "Platformda zeno teknolojisi izleri keşfedildiğinin farkında mıydınız?"
languages.original_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

traits.locale_text: "Platformda zeno teknolojisi izleri keşfedildiğinin farkında mıydınız?"

languages.text: « Saviez-vous que des signes de xénotechnologie avaient été découverts sur la plateforme ? »
languages.original_text: "Were you aware that signs of xenotech had been discovered on the platform?"

traits.locale_text: « Saviez-vous que des signes de xénotechnologie avaient été découverts sur la plateforme ? »
